description: Add AI chatbot placeholder UI, search placeholder, SEO optimization, accessibility polish, and final quality pass to ensure Lighthouse targets and WCAG 2.2 AA compliance.
steps: Create components/ai-chatbot.tsx - 'use client' floating chatbot button in bottom-right corner with a chat bubble icon (lucide-react MessageCircle). On click, opens a placeholder chat panel with a message like 'AI Assistant coming soon! This feature is under development.' Use framer-motion for open/close animation. Include aria-label, proper focus management, and escape key to close.

Create components/search-dialog.tsx - 'use client' search placeholder. A modal/dialog triggered by the search button in header (or Ctrl+K). Shows a search input with placeholder text 'Search Kiro Hub...' and a message 'Search functionality coming soon.' Use @radix-ui/react-dialog for accessibility. Include keyboard shortcut listener for Ctrl+K / Cmd+K.
Add the AI chatbot component to app/layout.tsx so it appears on all pages
Wire search-dialog into the header search button
SEO: Update app/layout.tsx metadata with comprehensive SEO fields: title template, description, keywords, openGraph, twitter card, robots, manifest link. Add viewport export if needed.
SEO: Create app/sitemap.ts that exports a sitemap function returning all page URLs
SEO: Create app/robots.ts that exports robots configuration

Accessibility pass: Ensure all pages have proper heading hierarchy (single h1 per page), all images have alt text, all interactive elements have focus-visible styles (ring-2 ring-offset-2), all animations respect prefers-reduced-motion, color contrast meets WCAG AA (4.5:1 for text), skip-to-content link at top of page
Create a skip-to-content link component in the header that becomes visible on focus
Performance: Ensure images use next/image with proper sizing, add loading='lazy' where appropriate, verify no large JS bundles are created unnecessarily (keep client components minimal)
Run bun run build and verify all routes compile successfully
acceptance_criteria: bun run build succeeds with all 7+ routes listed
AI chatbot placeholder appears as floating button on all pages
Search dialog opens on button click and Ctrl+K
Focus indicators are visible on all interactive elements
verification: Run 'bun run build' and confirm all routes compile with no errors
findings: All components built and verified. Build succeeds with all 7 page routes plus /robots.txt and /sitemap.xml. worker_threads warnings are non-fatal (bun limitation). Skip-to-content link added to layout. Search dialog wired to header buttons via dispatched keydown event. AI chatbot uses AnimatePresence for open/close animation. All interactive elements have focus-visible:ring-2 patterns.
